context_notes: Phase 4 core features work: new indicators, BETWEEN condition, free-form AI chat, strategy preview panel, terminal context seeding. But UX polish needed — analysis always uses 1d timeframe, can't redo analysis, action buttons overflow on mobile, analysis→strategy transition is disjointed. Anton chose wizard (3-step) pattern for the flow. Phase 4.1 should be inserted to address all polish items before moving to Phase 5.
